attributes.title: [Redis Enterprise OTel] Proxy & Listener
attributes.description: DMC proxy resource usage and listener-level performance metrics for Redis Enterprise endpoints: proxy CPU, memory, file descriptors, per-endpoint latency, throughput, and authentication activity.

params.markdown:
## [Redis Enterprise OTel] Proxy & Listener

Data-path monitoring for DMC proxies and listener endpoints:
- Proxy CPU utilisation and process memory
- File descriptor usage vs limits
- Per-endpoint latency and throughput breakdown
- Authentication errors and command counts
- Connection limit violations and active connections
- RESP protocol version distribution

query.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE dmcproxy_process_cpu_usage_percent IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_cpu = AVG(dmcproxy_process_cpu_usage_percent)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE dmcproxy_process_cpu_usage_percent IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_cpu = AVG(dmcproxy_process_cpu_usage_percent)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE dmcproxy_process_resident_memory_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS rss = AVG(dmcproxy_process_resident_memory_bytes) BY node, proxy
| STATS total_rss = SUM(rss)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE dmcproxy_process_resident_memory_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS rss = AVG(dmcproxy_process_resident_memory_bytes) BY node, proxy
| STATS total_rss = SUM(rss)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE dmcproxy_process_open_fds IS NOT NULL
| STATS open_fds = AVG(dmcproxy_process_open_fds), max_fds = AVG(dmcproxy_process_max_fds) BY node, proxy
| STATS total_open = SUM(open_fds), total_max = SUM(max_fds)
| EVAL fd_pct = ROUND((total_open / total_max) * 100, 1)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE dmcproxy_process_open_fds IS NOT NULL
| STATS open_fds = AVG(dmcproxy_process_open_fds), max_fds = AVG(dmcproxy_process_max_fds) BY node, proxy
| STATS total_open = SUM(open_fds), total_max = SUM(max_fds)
| EVAL fd_pct = ROUND((total_open / total_max) * 100, 1)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_auth_errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_auth_errors = SUM(listener_auth_errors)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_auth_errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_auth_errors = SUM(listener_auth_errors)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_total_req IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_req = SUM(listener_total_req)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_total_req IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_req = SUM(listener_total_req)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_acc_latency IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_latency = AVG(listener_acc_latency)
| EVAL avg_latency_ms = avg_latency * 1000

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_acc_latency IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_latency = AVG(listener_acc_latency)
| EVAL avg_latency_ms = avg_latency * 1000

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_max_connections_exceeded IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_exceeded = SUM(listener_max_connections_exceeded)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_max_connections_exceeded IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_exceeded = SUM(listener_max_connections_exceeded)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_conns IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_conns = AVG(listener_conns) BY bdb, endpoint
| STATS total_conns = SUM(avg_conns)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_conns IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_conns = AVG(listener_conns) BY bdb, endpoint
| STATS total_conns = SUM(avg_conns)

attributes.title: Proxy CPU Over Time by Node

query.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE dmcproxy_process_cpu_usage_percent IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_pct = AVG(dmcproxy_process_cpu_usage_percent) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE dmcproxy_process_cpu_usage_percent IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_pct = AVG(dmcproxy_process_cpu_usage_percent) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Proxy Resident Memory Over Time by Node

query.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE dmcproxy_process_resident_memory_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS rss = AVG(dmcproxy_process_resident_memory_bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE dmcproxy_process_resident_memory_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS rss = AVG(dmcproxy_process_resident_memory_bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Proxy File Descriptor Usage Over Time

query.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE dmcproxy_process_open_fds IS NOT NULL
| STATS open_fds = AVG(dmcproxy_process_open_fds), max_fds = AVG(dmcproxy_process_max_fds) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE dmcproxy_process_open_fds IS NOT NULL
| STATS open_fds = AVG(dmcproxy_process_open_fds), max_fds = AVG(dmcproxy_process_max_fds) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Proxy Virtual Memory Over Time by Node

query.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE dmcproxy_process_virtual_memory_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS virt = AVG(dmcproxy_process_virtual_memory_bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE dmcproxy_process_virtual_memory_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS virt = AVG(dmcproxy_process_virtual_memory_bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), node
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Listener Latency Over Time by Database

query.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_acc_latency IS NOT NULL
| STATS latency = AVG(listener_acc_latency) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_acc_latency IS NOT NULL
| STATS latency = AVG(listener_acc_latency) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Listener Throughput Over Time by Database

query.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_total_req IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_req = AVG(listener_total_req) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_total_req IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_req = AVG(listener_total_req) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_auth_errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS auth_errors = SUM(listener_auth_errors) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_auth_errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS auth_errors = SUM(listener_auth_errors) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_max_connections_exceeded IS NOT NULL
| STATS exceeded = SUM(listener_max_connections_exceeded) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_max_connections_exceeded IS NOT NULL
| STATS exceeded = SUM(listener_max_connections_exceeded) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_total_req IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Latency` = AVG(listener_acc_latency), `Read Latency` = AVG(listener_acc_read_latency), `Write Latency` = AVG(listener_acc_write_latency), `Total Req` = SUM(listener_total_req), `Read Req` = SUM(listener_read_req), `Write Req` = SUM(listener_write_req), Connections = AVG(listener_conns), `Auth Errors` = SUM(listener_auth_errors), `Max Conn Exceeded` = SUM(listener_max_connections_exceeded) BY bdb, endpoint, node, port
| EVAL `Latency` = COALESCE(`Latency`, 0.0), `Read Latency` = COALESCE(`Read Latency`, 0.0), `Write Latency` = COALESCE(`Write Latency`, 0.0), `Total Req` = COALESCE(`Total Req`, 0), `Read Req` = COALESCE(`Read Req`, 0), `Write Req` = COALESCE(`Write Req`, 0), Connections = COALESCE(Connections, 0), `Auth Errors` = COALESCE(`Auth Errors`, 0), `Max Conn Exceeded` = COALESCE(`Max Conn Exceeded`, 0)
| SORT `Total Req` DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE listener_total_req IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Latency` = AVG(listener_acc_latency), `Read Latency` = AVG(listener_acc_read_latency), `Write Latency` = AVG(listener_acc_write_latency), `Total Req` = SUM(listener_total_req), `Read Req` = SUM(listener_read_req), `Write Req` = SUM(listener_write_req), Connections = AVG(listener_conns), `Auth Errors` = SUM(listener_auth_errors), `Max Conn Exceeded` = SUM(listener_max_connections_exceeded) BY bdb, endpoint, node, port
| EVAL `Latency` = COALESCE(`Latency`, 0.0), `Read Latency` = COALESCE(`Read Latency`, 0.0), `Write Latency` = COALESCE(`Write Latency`, 0.0), `Total Req` = COALESCE(`Total Req`, 0), `Read Req` = COALESCE(`Read Req`, 0), `Write Req` = COALESCE(`Write Req`, 0), Connections = COALESCE(Connections, 0), `Auth Errors` = COALESCE(`Auth Errors`, 0), `Max Conn Exceeded` = COALESCE(`Max Conn Exceeded`, 0)
| SORT `Total Req` DESC
| LIMIT 100
